summary: Coaching Stability feature fully tested - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend API (GET/POST) returns correct data structure with severity, headline, summary, change_type, recommendation fields. Frontend displays COACHING STABILITY card in Journey page right sidebar with green 'Stable' badge, headline, summary, recommendation text, and working refresh button.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend coaching_stability.py: Properly implements caching with 7-day TTL, on-demand scanning fallback, and MongoDB upsert for persistence
Backend: Correctly excludes MongoDB _id from responses using pop('_id', None)
Frontend JourneyPage.js: CoachingStabilityBadge component properly handles all change_type values with appropriate color coding (green/yellow/red)

Frontend: All required data-testid attributes present: coaching-stability-card, coaching-stability-badge, coaching-stability-headline, coaching-stability-summary, coaching-stability-recommendation, coaching-stability-refresh-btn
Integration: Real DuckDuckGo search + Claude Sonnet AI analysis working correctly (not mocked)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Coaching Stability feature fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoints GET /api/coaching-stability/{program_id} and POST /api/coaching-stability/{program_id}/refresh working correctly. Frontend displays card in Journey page right sidebar with proper styling. First API call may take 10-15 seconds (real DuckDuckGo + AI scan), subsequent calls return cached data. Badge shows green for 'stable', yellow for 'new_hire'/'staff_change', red for 'departure'.

backend_get_endpoint.details: GET /api/coaching-stability/{program_id} returns 200 with stability object containing severity, headline, summary, change_type, recommendation

backend_caching.details: Second call returns source='cached' within 7-day TTL

frontend_card_display.details: COACHING STABILITY card visible in right sidebar with data-testid='coaching-stability-card'

frontend_headline.details: Headline displays 'No Recent Coaching Changes Reported'

frontend_summary.details: Summary text displays coaching stability analysis

frontend_refresh_button.details: Refresh button present and functional, card persists after refresh

mocked_apis.note: No APIs are mocked - real DuckDuckGo search + real Claude Sonnet AI analysis via Emergent LLM Key
